headlines.title: Judge halts Trump ‘anti-weaponization’ fund after Jan. 6 prosecutor sues
headlines.description: Judge halts Trump ‘anti-weaponization’ fund after Jan. 6 prosecutor files suit

headlines.title: Pam Bondi tells lawmakers ‘redaction errors’ were made in Epstein files release
headlines.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi told lawmakers on the House Oversight Committee on Friday that the Justice Department made “redaction errors” in its release of records related to Jeffrey Epstein, according to a copy of her opening statement obtained by NBC News

headlines.title: Haley Stevens’ campaign clarifies filibuster stance after Michigan Democratic debate
headlines.description: Rep. Haley Stevens, D-Mich., seemed to give conflicting answers about what to do about the Senate’s 60-vote filibuster rule during a wide-ranging Senate Democratic primary debate Thursday.“The filibuster must go so that we can codify health care,” Stevens said, while adding: “We should use the filibuster to not allow the big ugly bill to pass that increased our debt.”It was a reference to President Donald Trump’s so-called big, beautiful bill that extended his 2017 tax cuts.

headlines.title: Rep. Frederica Wilson, an 83-year-old Florida Democrat, won’t seek re-election
headlines.description: Rep. Frederica Wilson, D-Fla., a former teacher and principal known in Congress for her colorful outfits and matching hats, said she will not seek re-election this fall.

headlines.title: Multiple Artists Drop Out of Freedom 250 DC Concert Lineup
headlines.description: Freedom 250, a public-private partnership backed by President Donald Trump, announced a list of performers Wednesday for The Great American State Fair, but shortly after, Martina McBride, Young MC, The Commodores and more, announced that they would not be making appearances, sparking a wave of controversy. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: DOJ Launches Criminal Probe Into Trump Accuser E. Jean Caroll
headlines.description: The Department of Justice has launched a federal criminal probe into E. Jean Carroll linked to her two civil court victories against President Donald Trump. The investigation is focusing on how Caroll’s legal team was funded. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Russian Drone Hits Romanian Apartment Block, Drawing Outrage
headlines.description: A drone crashed into an apartment building in Romania early Friday during a Russian attack on neighboring Ukraine. The incident is sparking a wave of alarm and condemnation from European powers and NATO. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’
headlines.description: Vance said in an interview with NBC News he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Americans who get Ebola will go to Europe for treatment, not U.S., officials say
headlines.description: If additional Americans contract Ebola and need medical care, they will be sent to Europe rather than brought home to the U.S., senior administration officials said.

headlines.title: Indicted terrorist commander allegedly spoke of wanting to target Ivanka Trump
headlines.description: The accused commander of a terrorist organization is alleged to have discussed wanting to target Ivanka Trump, President Donald Trump’s oldest daughter, as part of a series of attacks, according to three sources familiar with the matter

headlines.title: Artists bail on D.C. bash for America’s 250th birthday after being listed on the lineup
headlines.description: Four musical artists listed as performers at a National Mall event in Washington, including Martina McBride and The Commodores, said they won’t be attending despite being listed on the lineup.
